{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231929196D38495F6D6D0687E8DE"}"},"total":124},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7287195664352559887","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看好看好看！打比赛的果果酱好帅，我都想开游戏去玩一局了呜呜呜！还有就是好像可发展对象蛮多的，尽快开始甜甜的恋爱吧！[爱慕][爱慕][爱慕]","text_exts":[{"e":56,"s":51,"text":"甜甜的恋爱","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%94%9C%E7%94%9C%E7%9A%84%E6%81%8B%E7%88%B1&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742653590687E8DE%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227287195664352559887%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227283485262548569143%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%94%9C%E7%94%9C%E7%9A%84%E6%81%8B%E7%88%B1%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1696683192,"group_id":"7283485262548569143","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7xVVfqPZ/dBadoagg5hxJUeVbd5JRcb4AbThkTU/HMh","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/8ed31e2f20674bf995c7f6165fc74538~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788789&x-signature=44oIgWK5fpMO08u0ONr7JT07Lps%3D","user_id":"3558463384069582","user_name":"校对大夫"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3558463384069582","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7283485262548569143","book_info":{"abstract":"【女子电竞+对抗路战神+微·万人迷+爽文】
前FMVP选手柯果果，因为领奖台上的口嗨而穿越到一个全新的世界。
这里女子电竞刚刚起步，中国战队屡败世界赛。
开局竟被嘲笑峡谷第一肉装妲己？疯狂被对面打野gank？
好好好，让你们见识一下什么叫对抗路的神，嘲讽的王者。
从一开始的表演赛，到最后的世界舞台，游戏不停，嘴人不止，看柯大将军如何拉最深的仇恨，秀最亮眼的操作。
一代版本一代神，代代版本果果神
且看峡谷豌豆射手·平头哥型对抗路少女，如何打遍天下无敌手，又如何从万草丛中过，挑选出适合自己的那一颗。
闭嘴纯欲女神，张嘴游戏喷子爷——柯果果
闭嘴花花公子，张嘴克己守礼老干部——某位神秘人士","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o9750de4c8d1f3c416d989ba8915085c7~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"你是我的光神","author_id":"","book_id":"7283485262548569143","book_name":"电竞：闭口纯欲女神，张口喷子爷","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d0a8b0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":749,"name":"青春甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=749&name=青春甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":457,"name":"虐渣","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=457&name=虐渣&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7283485375819940407","read_count":"622","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"771291"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.1","serial_count":"356","tags":"青春甜宠,现代言情,穿越,虐渣,打脸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/83ee4cb8007b9a227b99e1e785b5b78b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779449359&x-signature=YuWtBUgf5j6xnf2E2WuLbRIn3ZY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3505688577835821","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"9.712773e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231929196D38495F6D6D0687E8DE"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":20,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":11749,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":21461,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":7630},
